faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the Imayam College of Engineering is approximately INR 200000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Imayam College of Engineering offers a wide range of programmes at UG level. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. Imayam College of Engineering fee structure was INR 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Imayam College of Engineering is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Imayam College of Engineering are Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cyber Security.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Imayam College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Imayam College of Engineering provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech in streams such as Engineering, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. faqs.question: Which courses does Imayam College of Engineering offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Really good facilities.

review_content.Placements: Over 70 percent of students in my college are placed across various courses. Top recruiting companies include Tata, Ola, and others. A senior in my program who had an 85 percent average got an internship and a job at Tata Motors. The role offered in my course is programmer developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course and department have high-speed internet service across the whole campus. The hostel facilities are very nice, and the campus has a private canteen and a college mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Totally dissatisfied with their coaching and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: 2% of the students got placed by their own but not through on-campus placements. Rs.10k salary was offered by non IT companies in on campus placement. 100% paid internship only for certificate were offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities like Wi-Fi is only for computer labs. We have small and good classrooms, library have sufficient books for our course, and all department labs. Hostel is good, quality of food is average, no medical facilities are available but sports and games are available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are not that helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. Teaching quality is below average, they actually don't help us to clear our doubts and just ignore. The course is good and It make the students industry ready. Semester exams are not that much difficult if you study properly. The pass percentage is 50%.

admission_process.title: Imayam College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Imayam College of Engineering admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG level in streams includingEngineering and IT and Software.Imayam College of Engineeringadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asTNEA and CBSE 12th. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,00,000for UG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

faqs.question: How can I get into Golden Valley Integrated Campus for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Golden Valley Integrated Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC
approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have

faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Chhattisgarh Engineering College for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Chhattisgarh Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate who has passed Diploma in Engineering/Architecture from a recognised board/university with 45% marks for UR category (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC and PWD category of Chattisgarh) can also apply for the course. Candidate passing 10th/12th through distance learning/open school shall be eligible for admission. Candidate passed Diploma programme through distance learning shall not be eligible to apply. If the candidate has passed 10+2 examination, but failed in one or more compulsory subject than the candidate shall not be considered eligible for admission. If the candidate is declared passed with grace as per the rule of related board than the candidate shall be eligible to apply. reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good to improve our technical skills.

review_content.Placements: Students who have scored 60% of marks in their academics are choosing our civil engineering course. The highest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. However, jobs may not secure. More than 40% of the students got an internship from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our coarse like labs, classrooms and library are average. Facilities in our college are good. Canteen provided in our college was good. We are encouraged in sports like volleyball, cricket and kabaddi.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: It is not a good college, but it is average.

review_content.Placements: It is an average college. It is useful for jobholders.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many classrooms and labs for practicals. They provide the best at practicals. It is near to bus stand and railway station. It is not good, but a normal college. It provides bus facility. It is a good college for MBA students.
review_content.Faculty: Half of the teachers in our college are well qualified and well educated. Some teachers are not good. They give their best, and they and very friendly. Some teachers teach well, and some of them were not good at teaching. They can learn very quickly to maintain a good education. There are educated lab sirs, and they will explain record books. They provide good communication skills. They are experienced.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: CIST Kakinada Mechanical batch review - Below average.

review_content.Placements: I can tell hardly 20% of students were placed on campus (that too off-campus). The highest package was Rs 3.6 LPA & the lowest was Rs 2.8 LPA. None of us got any internships from companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Being a mechanical graduate, I can give a 2.5-star rating for mechanical labs. Although we have all the equipment but doesn't work properly. There is no free Wi-Fi for students. For each subject, we are having only 3-4 useful authors, let's imagine the probability of getting a textbook from the library is 0.045%.
review_content.Faculty: All teachers & faculty are just graduated (completed B.Tech) as us. Only, a few are having an M.Tech degree and they are also not having enough knowledge to teach us. The pass percentage is 65 (who cleared all subjects). Only a few will be strict to syllabus books & curriculum given by the university.

faq_section.introduction: The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. answer.text: Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology and secure the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Preference will be given to candidates qualified in GATE in the relevant branch based on their test scores and the remaining seats with the candidates qualified in APPGECET as per their merit ranks. Final year student can also apply, provided they have completed the prescribed course and passed all the subjects for the award of degree by the concerned university on or before the date of counselling.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology for UG/PG courses?

rows:
Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.

Candidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB.
Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.

Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.

Candidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology and secure the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Preference will be given to candidates qualified in GATE in the relevant branch based on their test scores and the remaining seats with the candidates qualified in APPGECET as per their merit ranks.
Final year student can also apply, provided they have completed the prescribed course and passed all the subjects for the award of degree by the concerned
university on or before the date of counselling.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology.

content.Placements: Chaitanya Institute of Engineering and Technology in Kakinada offers fewer placement opportunities but the teaching is good. The top roles offered in CS are software engineering, web developers and more. And I think that the placements offered are so few.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for the labs allocated is good and not the best, but for learning purposes, the equipment is quick enough. Also, the college labs and Wi-Fi are good. And the library is a key place in our college. The mess food is a little bit of a backlog for the college hostel. But the canteen food is excellent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is not a good college for engineering, but it is a good polytechnic.

content.Placements: There are no campus drives. The polytechnic students are getting some placements in Chennai and Bangalore. For B.Tech students, there are no drives because of Corona.
content.Infrastructure: The library is okay but not very updated. The books in the library are old. The labs are not good. The equipment is available, but only some of it is operational. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The canteen is not good, and the food served is below average.
content.Faculty: The teachers here are good. Some have good knowledge of other subjects. Some teachers have a very good experience. A few teachers are freshers, like recent pass-outs from other colleges, and have joined this college for teaching and staffing. Some faculty members are very good at teaching.

paragraphs: Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in GATE, AP EAMCET, and AP PGECET, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in several specialisations.Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technologyoffers B.E. / B.Tech at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 1,60,000. Aspirants have to payINR 70,000 - 1,00,000for PG courses.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Co

reviews.review_heading: Review of Chaitanya Institute Of Science And Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for the labs allocated is good and not the best, but for learning purposes, the equipment is quick enough. Also, the college labs and Wi-Fi are good. And the library is a key place in our college. The mess food is a little bit of a backlog for the college hostel. But the canteen food is excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college for engineering, but it is a good polytechnic.
reviews.review_text: The library is okay but not very updated. The books in the library are old. The labs are not good. The equipment is available, but only some of it is operational. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The canteen is not good, and the food served is below average.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good to improve our technical skills.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our coarse like labs, classrooms and library are average. Facilities in our college are good. Canteen provided in our college was good. We are encouraged in sports like volleyball, cricket and kabaddi.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college, but it is average.
reviews.review_text: There are many classrooms and labs for practicals. They provide the best at practicals. It is near to bus stand and railway station. It is not good, but a normal college. It provides bus facility. It is a good college for MBA students.

reviews.review_heading: CIST Kakinada Mechanical batch review - Below average.
reviews.review_text: Being a mechanical graduate, I can give a 2.5-star rating for mechanical labs. Although we have all the equipment but doesn't work properly. There is no free Wi-Fi for students. For each subject, we are having only 3-4 useful authors, let's imagine the probability of getting a textbook from the library is 0.045%.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are secured and serve quality food for 100% sure. So, students need not to worry about food and security. Students are in a safe place, along with following the daily diet. Wi-Fi facility is available. Wardens are there to protect the children. If any medical assistance is required, they take instant care.

college_info.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Founded in 2020, Shri Shankaracharya Professional University is a private university. It is located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in both Full Time and Part Time modes. It provides 45 courses across specialisations such as Computer Science Engineering, Health Information Administration and Nursery Teacher Training (NTT). Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University fees ranges between INR 15,000 to 2,80,000. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Design. Shri Shankaracharya Professional University offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: SSPU a perfect college for management.

review_content.Placements: The placement opportunities are good in our college; we get decent internship opportunities. The average package offered was four LPA. People who have passed out from our course get good posts in good companies and create good startups. They have good managing skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. We have air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity available in our classrooms, and a very good auditorium. There are many good opportunities for sports and games. Overall, one can have a decent college life, and the library is also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: They provide a good opportunity for placements. I researched for college, I saw last year's placemen

review_content.Placements: 70% placement is offered in computer science. The average package is 3.5 LPA, and the highest is 11 to 14 LPA. Companies which are recruiting are mainly IBM, Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc. But internship placements are very low. Top courses are CS, marketing, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are good, but the hostel is not very good. Medical facilities are also good in sports and games. It is good for new students. Routers are also available. Transportation facilities are also good. The college offers good services and study modes.

overview_faqs.question: Can you elaborate on the BSc Design career?
overview_faqs.answer: Sure, the BSc Design career scope is vast, with diverse career paths based on the specialisation you choose to study. It will offer you not just the theoretical knowledge but also help you gain creative and technical skills. You can even go for freelance opportunities once you gain relevant skills and experience in the industry.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure and faculty members are good, but placements are not really good.

content.Placements: Less than 20% were placed, with the highest package being 1.8 LPA and the lowest I don’t know. Only Patra India came for all courses. Less than 10% do internship. The dream is for a developed career, but instead, I am forced to work as a call center executive. Placements are the worst. If you just want a degree without a job, you can join this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best in Bhilai, with premium labs equipped with Intel i3 11th Gen CPUs. There is Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work, and the lift in our building is broken. Classrooms are quite good, and the library is very big. We get every book from the library, and I haven't purchased any books during my graduation.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: If you are not from Chhattisgarh, don't take admission; it is not that much worth it.

content.Placements: They say there are 100% placements but it totally depends on the skills you have to clear the interview. Google, Samsung, Honda, Lava, HCL, etc. are the top recruitment companies. Assistant engineer, backend developer, frontend developer, etc. are the top roles offered. The highest package is around 20 lacs, and the average package is 5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: Every daily need for facilities is available in the hostel and, in particular, in every department. Food quality is good, medical facilities like first aid are available, and a sports field is available on campus. Infrastructure is good and it looks green; there are canteens and mess.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: SSPU a perfect college for management.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities are good in our college; we get decent internship opportunities. The average package offered was four LPA. People who have passed out from our course get good posts in good companies and create good startups. They have good managing skills.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is very good. We have air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity available in our classrooms, and a very good auditorium. There are many good opportunities for sports and games. Overall, one can have a decent college life, and the library is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: They provide a good opportunity for placements. I researched for college, I saw last year's placemen

content.Placements: 70% placement is offered in computer science. The average package is 3.5 LPA, and the highest is 11 to 14 LPA. Companies which are recruiting are mainly IBM, Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, etc. But internship placements are very low. Top courses are CS, marketing, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are good, but the hostel is not very good. Medical facilities are also good in sports and games. It is good for new students. Routers are also available. Transportation facilities are also good. The college offers good services and study modes.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: You can have fun only if have nice friend group here.

content.Placements: Placement companies do visit our campus. I don't know much about placements as I did not have any interaction with my super seniors but I know that good placements are offered in our campus, TCS and many more. In BCA you get placement offers for web development post/job.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is great. We have nice computer labs, classrooms and library. Canteen is okay and food is not bad. There is not much facilities in hostel. You have to bring everything of your need you cannot expect that with hostel and yes outing time is only till 6 pm after that you have to take permission from your parents.

paragraphs: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University admission 2025 is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The institute considers scores in CG PPT, CBSE 12th, and CGBSE 12th, etc. for admission. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and Certificate levels in several specialisations.Shri Shankaracharya Professional Universityoffers B.Sc(Hons.) and B.P.Ed at UG level and M.P.Ed and PG Diploma at the PG level.
Aspirants who are selected for admission need to pay the course fees. The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 16,000 - 2,80,000. Aspirants have to payINR 20,000 - 1,60,000for PG courses.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty members are good, but placements are not really good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in Bhilai, with premium labs equipped with Intel i3 11th Gen CPUs. There is Wi-Fi, but it doesn't work, and the lift in our building is broken. Classrooms are quite good, and the library is very big. We get every book from the library, and I haven't purchased any books during my graduation.

reviews.review_heading: If you are not from Chhattisgarh, don't take admission; it is not that much worth it.
reviews.review_text: Every daily need for facilities is available in the hostel and, in particular, in every department. Food quality is good, medical facilities like first aid are available, and a sports field is available on campus. Infrastructure is good and it looks green; there are canteens and mess.

reviews.review_heading: SSPU a perfect college for management.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. We have air-conditioned classrooms, Wi-Fi connectivity available in our classrooms, and a very good auditorium. There are many good opportunities for sports and games. Overall, one can have a decent college life, and the library is also available.

reviews.review_heading: They provide a good opportunity for placements. I researched for college, I saw last year's placemen
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries are good, but the hostel is not very good. Medical facilities are also good in sports and games. It is good for new students. Routers are also available. Transportation facilities are also good. The college offers good services and study modes.

reviews.review_heading: You can have fun only if have nice friend group here.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is great. We have nice computer labs, classrooms and library. Canteen is okay and food is not bad. There is not much facilities in hostel. You have to bring everything of your need you cannot expect that with hostel and yes outing time is only till 6 pm after that you have to take permission from your parents.

reviews.review_heading: SSPU the college is very good but not good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure in my college is very good. The college environment is also good. In my college, facility in my college hostel, canteen, medical, sports, and games are also good. In my mess, every day change the food, according to veg and non-veg. Also every day, non-veg and veg also making in my mess.

reviews.review_heading: A bit disappoint because of some faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our faculty members provide good service when it comes to our infrastructure. It has good interior. There is a good library. We have good comfortable classrooms. It's very great for sports and activities. Faculty members also put interest and your needs. As I wanted a sports tournament and they arranged it for us.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is good for the student who wants to graduate and enjoy the college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities which available are good as a normally student want in college and in library all the books are available which are provided by the teachers to study. The labs are also well maintained and the grounds are clean and so many tournament take place in the university.

reviews.review_heading: Firstly come and visit college for your own better review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure is good. Classroom were neat and clean library were so good in library their is so much silence so that you can properly constraints on your reading canteen were so amazing you can chilling with your friends fun to go their amazing .

reviews.review_heading: Shri Shankaracharya Professional University is best college in Bhilai but improve in extra activity.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available but poor. Labs are good and library is so good. Classrooms are not good. Hostel is available. Canteen is also available. Sports and games are available but no role to play. Medical facilities are not there but there is one medical college in front of our college.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering provides Full Time and Part Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 35,000 to 2,50,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed in our college. The highest salary offered was Rs.25,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs.10,000 per month. There were no top recruiting companies in this college. Almost 10-30% of students got internships in local companies. Top roles offered were trainee and operators. Few students got placed in this college and our college management should invite many companies to hire students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Mainly all departments were impressive. Wi-Fi was not available but laboratories were provided. It also provided a big library and the hostel was also nice. The food served in the canteen was good. All facilities were good in this college. Sports activities were also provided. Classrooms were neat.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Best college only for architecture, not for B.Tech.

review_content.Placements: They bought some BPOs like zealous services and Sutherland in 2016. But now I didn't know about it. There would be no placement now, I think so. Please join some other good college any where.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure would be great. They will tell you that they got all facilities for the students. For infrastructure I will give 4 out of 5 marks. Library is good. But no Wi-Fi in college campus. Labs are so old.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are less experienced and got no knowledge. Even sometimes I think better it's right time to drop out from college. The only perfect department is B. architecture, students can prefer that course. All the other departments are the worst. Please don't join in B.Tech or B.E in this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2012
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: It is the worst college. There faculty members lack qualification. No control over the students. Worst management. Seniors ragged us. Only one good thing is lab facility is good for Mechanical Engineering. The campus is not up to the mark. The college is located in very interior area. We can enjoy like anything. Only 20/120 guys working now.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arulmigu Meenakshi Amman College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Mainly all departments were impressive. Wi-Fi was not available but laboratories were provided. It also provided a big library and the hostel was also nice. The food served in the canteen was good. All facilities were good in this college. Sports activities were also provided. Classrooms were neat.

reviews.review_heading: Best college only for architecture, not for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure would be great. They will tell you that they got all facilities for the students. For infrastructure I will give 4 out of 5 marks. Library is good. But no Wi-Fi in college campus. Labs are so old.

It is the worst college. There faculty members lack qualification. No control over the students. Worst management. Seniors ragged us. 
Only one good thing is lab facility is good for Mechanical Engineering. The campus is not up to the mark. The college is located in very interior area. We can enjoy like anything. Only 20/120 guys working now. It is the worst college. There faculty members lack qualification. No control over the students. Worst management. Seniors ragged us. 
Only one good thing is lab facility is good for Mechanical Engineering. The campus is not up to the mark. The college is located in very interior area. We can enjoy like anything. Only 20/120 guys working now.

reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college had not provided placements for students. They had not given importance to placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel was good. Wi-Fi, a library, and labs were available in our college. Canteen was good. The food served in the canteen was not good. Medical facilities were not available in our college. Sports were good, and all grounds were available in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers were good and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality was good. They conducted tests daily to clear exams easily. They provided guidelines for exams. Students passed semester exams easily with a good percentage.

reviews_list.review_title: Every year students get good placements, but this year we didn't get. Otherwise, all are good.

review_content.Placements: Only 12 students are studying in our course of B.Tech in IT. About 16 students got placed in TCS company out of 40 students who attended interviews. For our course, the fee is only Rs. 28,000 per year. Compared to other colleges in that area, our college has low fees for students. Internships depend on students, and staff members don't force them to do.
review_content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi facility is available here, and also labs and classroom are separately available for courses, but the library is common to all departments. I am a days scholar. However, according to my friends who stayed in the hostel, hostel life is joyful, and the food will be changed as per the students choice. In our college, there will be state-level champions in all games.

faqs.answer: Bharath Niketan Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.MCACandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

review_summary.college_name: Bharath Niketan Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: 4 years of my life in the campus.

content.Placements: Our college couldn't provide placements for computer courses. Every year, 50 percent of students are only placed in jobs. Google, Infosys and many more top companies offered jobs for my course. Least of the students got internships from my course.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has good labs and classrooms. Our library is maintained well. Here, my department provides high-level suggestions to every student. Our girls hostel is located in the center of campus. There are separate hostels on the campus for both men and women.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Bharath Niketan Engineering College is a good college.

content.Placements: Bharath Niketan Engineering College is one of the good colleges in Tamilnadu. Over 90 percent of my course students were placed in good companies. The top recruiting companies are coming to this college campus for interviews, e.g., JSW, TCS, Maruti Suzuki, etc. Salary packages range between INR 30000 and 1.5 lakh per month.
content.Infrastructure: The Bharath Niketan Engineering College campus was very big. The entire campus is well maintained by this college's management. Multi-specialty laboratories are available for this college. One of the biggest libraries is also available at this college. Hostel and canteen food is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college had not provided placements for students. They had not given importance to placements.

content.Faculty: Teachers were good and knowledgeable. Their teaching quality was good. They conducted tests daily to clear exams easily. They provided guidelines for exams. Students passed semester exams easily with a good percentage.

individual_reviews.title: Every year students get good placements, but this year we didn't get. Otherwise, all are good.

content.Placements: Only 12 students are studying in our course of B.Tech in IT. About 16 students got placed in TCS company out of 40 students who attended interviews. For our course, the fee is only Rs. 28,000 per year. Compared to other colleges in that area, our college has low fees for students. Internships depend on students, and staff members don't force them to do.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi facility is available here, and also labs and classroom are separately available for courses, but the library is common to all departments. I am a days scholar. However, according to my friends who stayed in the hostel, hostel life is joyful, and the food will be changed as per the students choice. Medical facilities are always available for our safety. Our college provides quality sports facilities, which are more useful to students. In our college, there will be state-level champions in all games.

individual_reviews.title: College with above average placements, more importance for sports, simply it's good.

Top companies offering our sector is Amazon, Meta and apple, mostly 80 percent of people got internship in abservetech pvt. Securing network and app developing plays the top roles according to my course.

Hostel facility is above average and food facility is average, canteen is common for all, medical facility in available, sports and games have so much hype in our college/hostel.

admission_process.title: Bharath Niketan Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Bharath Niketan Engineering College admission 2025 is merit-based. To apply for the programmes offered, students need to clear the preset admission criteria. At Bharath Niketan Engineering College, students can pursue wide range of programmes in fields, such as Engineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.

Some of the popular Bharath Niketan Engineering College programmes are B.E. / B.Tech, etc at UG level and MBA/PGDM and MCA at PG level. These programmes are offered in full time mode. See below the key highlights for Bharath Niketan Engineering College admissions:

The institute offers B.E. / B.Tech in specialisations such as Electrical Engineering, Information Technology and Civil Engineering. Admission to B.E. / B.Tech programme is based on TNEA, CBSE 12th, and Tamilnadu 12th scores of the aspirants. The total tuition fees for B.E. / B.Tech isINR 2,00,000. Admission to M.E./M.Tech course is based on scores of the aspirants in GATE and CEETA. There are a total of 54 seats in the M.E./M.Tech programme. The total tuition fees for this course isINR 50,000. faqs.question: How can I get into Bharath Niketan Engineering College for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Bharath Niketan Engineering College has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible,

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Bharath Niketan Engineering College for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Bharath Niketan Engineering College is up to 594. Good thing to know is that Bharath Niketan Engineering College has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

reviews.review_heading: 4 years of my life in the campus.
reviews.review_text: Our department has  good labs and classrooms. Our library is maintained well. Here, my department provides high-level suggestions to every student. Our girls hostel is located in the center of campus. There are separate hostels on the campus for both men and women.

reviews.review_heading: Bharath Niketan Engineering College is a good college.
reviews.review_text: The Bharath Niketan Engineering College campus was very big. The entire campus is well maintained by this college's management. Multi-specialty laboratories are available for this college. One of the biggest libraries is also available at this college. Hostel and canteen food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was good. Wi-Fi, a library, and labs were available in our college. Canteen was good. The food served in the canteen was not good. Medical facilities were not available in our college. Sports were good, and all grounds were available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Every year students get good placements, but this year we didn't get. Otherwise, all are good.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi facility is available here, and also labs and classroom are separately available for courses, but the library is common to all departments. I am a days scholar. However, according to my friends who stayed in the hostel, hostel life is joyful, and the food will be changed as per the students choice. Medical facilities are always available for our safety. Our college provides quality sports facilities, which are more useful to students. In our college, there will be state-level champion...

reviews.review_heading: College with above average placements, more importance for sports, simply it's good.
reviews.review_text: For my course there is a separate lab and have free Wi-Fi availability, classrooms, and have an common library that is separate into sectors. Hostel facility is above average and food facility is average, canteen is common for all, medical facility in available, sports and games have so much hype in our college/hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Best place to study and give lots of opportunities to 2019 students.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Any free time we can access or use library and laboratories. Boys' and girls' hostels are available with all facilities. Canteens are there with snack items, breakfast, and dinner also. Affordable taste with good price. Library not only have study books other than general knowledge and communication books. Lots of places to read books peacefully. Veg and non veg food are available in hostel mess. And Wi-Fi facilities are also available in hostels. Each member have a separate...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is absolutely fantastic with really good infrastructure and best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The climate of the college is excellent as it is very cool and calm. Perfect lab facilities and Wi-Fi are available. Our college has a huge library, where many books are available. The food served in the mess is almost like the food served in hotels. In sports, BNEC is always top in the district. The first-aid facility is available, and the hospital available near the college is always helpful for us.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: I am highly dissatisfied with the management, and there is a lack of teachers every time.

review_content.Placements: About 13 students got placed from our course in the previous year. There were no placements, or none of the companies visits here for placements. About 5 students out of 13 students got internships in Supertech. The top role offered is a junior engineer. I am highly dissatisfied with placements. The main thing is when you visit our college to take admission it assures that it provides 100% placements. Placements are not only provided us, and even our seniors also did not get placements from there.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was a separate block for all branches. There was no Wi-Fi facility in the classrooms, and the library was good. The hostel is well furnished, but the food served in the mess was terrible. However, the canteen was fine, but there are no medical facilities. For sports, our college was good, and there is a cricket academy here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good teachers and needs to work on the study materials to make them more practical.

review_content.Placements: It was a good college. Our college did not provide good placements. Top recruiting companies visited our campus. Most mechanical engineering students were selected.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provided good infrastructure. The hostel rooms were not good. The quality of the food in the mess was not good. The canteen and bus facilities were not good. There was no college bus. They hired a private bus for students.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers were good and supportive. They were helpful. The study material was good, but students must work on the practical portion more than the theory. Semester exams depended on students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Vision Institute of Technology, Kanpur is good college for engineering.

review_content.Placements: Vision institute of technology Kanpur is a good college. Very poor placements were given when I was in the college. Approximately, 25 to 35% was the ratio of placements, but now they are better and provide approximately, 3 to 7 LPA. Jain Irrigation is the top recruiting company in agricultural engineering. 65% students got internship. The role offered is sales executive.

review_summary.college_name: Vision Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has great faculty members, strong placements, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: Our B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering batch has an impressive placement rate and 60-75 percent of students get placed in top companies like HCL, Dataman, etc. The highest salary package offered ranges from 5-13 LPA, and the average package ranges from 3-8 LPA. About 60-75% of students also secured internships at renowned companies. Roles like software engineer, data scientist, full stack developer, etc., are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Our department offers high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs equipped with the latest technology, spacious classrooms designed for optimal learning, and a well-stocked library with a wide range of resources. The hostels provide comfortable living with nutritious food, 24x7 medical care, and excellent sports facilities to promote both physical and mental well-being.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My honest review for my college.

content.Placements: 50% of students every year are placed in this course. The highest package of the campus placement is 2 LPA. Many software and mechanical companies visited for campus placement. Developer roles were offered in this course. 20% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the campus is overall good. Teachers are more supportive than in other colleges. Hostel facilities are also good. Sports and games are held every week or month, including quizzes and other games, which are important for student growth in the course.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good teachers and needs to work on the study materials to make them more practical.

content.Placements: It was a good college. Our college did not provide good placements. Top recruiting companies visited our campus. Most mechanical engineering students were selected.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provided good infrastructure. The hostel rooms were not good. The quality of the food in the mess was not good. The canteen and bus facilities were not good. There was no college bus. They hired a private bus for students.
content.Faculty: Our teachers were good and supportive. They were helpful. The study material was good, but students must work on the practical portion more than the theory. Semester exams depended on students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agriculture Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Vision Institute of Technology, Kanpur is good college for engineering.

content.Placements: Vision institute of technology Kanpur is a good college. Very poor placements were given when I was in the college. Approximately, 25 to 35% was the ratio of placements, but now they are better and provide approximately, 3 to 7 LPA. Jain Irrigation is the top recruiting company in agricultural engineering. 65% students got internship. The role offered is sales executive.
content.Infrastructure: Full Wi-Fi network is available at campus and classes. Labs are fully working, and classrooms have AC and are noise proof. Library is available and all the books are also available, but you can issue 3 books at a time. Hostel quality is good, there are two options available, paid and unpaid. Food quality is low because I am also eating the food, it's not tasty and it is oily. Sports ground is available. Volleyball, cricket, football, cheese and many indoor games are available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Some facilities of the institution are not very good.

content.Placements: There are approximately 1500 students enrolled in this college. Some companies, such as HCL, WIPRO, and others, offer a maximum package of 4.5 L, while others offer a minimum package of 2.5 L. 60% of students receive internships, and the top roles offered by companies are graduate engineer trainees.
content.Infrastructure: The campus's infrastructure is good, and classrooms are well-equipped with all necessary equipment to provide students with a well-maintained learning and working environment. For students, the college campus is environmentally friendly and conducive to learning.

reviews.review_heading: It has great faculty members, strong placements, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department offers high-speed Wi-Fi, modern labs equipped with the latest technology, spacious classrooms designed for optimal learning, and a well-stocked library with a wide range of resources. The hostels provide comfortable living with nutritious food, 24x7 medical care, and excellent sports facilities to promote both physical and mental well-being.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review for my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is overall good. Teachers are more supportive than in other colleges. Hostel facilities are also good. Sports and games are held every week or month, including quizzes and other games, which are important for student growth in the course.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers and needs to work on the study materials to make them more practical.
reviews.review_text: Our college provided good infrastructure. The hostel rooms were not good. The quality of the food in the mess was not good. The canteen and bus facilities were not good. There was no college bus. They hired a private bus for students.

reviews.review_heading: Vision Institute of Technology, Kanpur is good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Full Wi-Fi network is available at campus and classes. Labs are fully working, and classrooms have AC and are noise proof. Library is available and all the books are also available, but you can issue 3 books at a time. Hostel quality is good, there are two options available, paid and unpaid. Food quality is low because I am also eating the food, it's not tasty and it is oily. Sports ground is available. Volleyball, cricket, football, cheese and many indoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Some facilities of the institution are not very good.
reviews.review_text: The campus's infrastructure is good, and classrooms are well-equipped with all necessary equipment to provide students with a well-maintained learning and working environment. For students, the college campus is environmentally friendly and conducive to learning.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college had facilities like labs, libraries, etc. The hostel food was not good. There was good ground and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: In this college, the facility is not good for students.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is not enabled for students, if the student gets the password of Wi-Fi then the password has been changed. The laboratory is available but the experiment is less. Only core subject books are available i.e 8 to 10 years old. Food quality is not good. The canteen and sports are good. Medical facility is not good.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty members of our college are good.
reviews.review_text: The college was fully loaded with the all necessary need of students and the labs were well mentioned. We had sports tournaments like cricket, chess, and badminton. The hostel was also good. There were three different segments of the hostel namely, male, female, and both. One was luxurious and the other was for only students. The quality of food was not so good but it could be adjustable. Feedback was taken by the college admin so you can share and help to improve the canteen. It was not air-con...

reviews.review_heading: The review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for all students and staff. Many types of labs are there in my institute. The classrooms are good for studies. The library is available and the staff was helpful. Hostels have 2 buildings for students and 1 for staff. The mess and canteen were available. Medical facilities are not available but there is a government hospital nearby.

reviews.review_heading: It is the most affordable college for engineering in Kanpur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but there is no maintenance. They save money, and they work only for money. Even we don't have any faculty members for our main subject, i.e., computer science in the 1st year. I cleared exams on my own. The management is the worst ever.

reviews.review_heading: I would rate the college with 5/5, and there are no issues.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome. The facilities provided in our hostel are good. The quality of food served in the mess and canteen is satisfactory. The medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also provided in our college. The college campus is very beautiful. There are Wi-Fi, laboratories, and classrooms. In the library various books are available. All the facilities in the hostel are excellent.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because there are no campus placements for our branch.
reviews.review_text: In our department, there are labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms and a library. I am a day scholar. In our college, there is a canteen, playground to play sports and games like carrom and chess. In our hostel, moderate quality food is served. The hostel has 24x7 electricity. Medical facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good if you just want a degree and don't bother about college life.
reviews.review_text: Living in the hostel here is bad, and the quality of the food served is the worst. Hostel life is not at all fun here as you have seen in movies or heard from your friends. I was a day scholar, so I don't know much about the hostel facility. I have been there in the hostel for a couple of time, and my experience was not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for studies and other activities.
reviews.review_text: I would rate 6 out of 10 for the infrastructure of our college. Sports and classrooms are available on the campus. The food is available in the canteen. Hostel rooms are cleaned. I am not facing any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college. The college offers positive atmosphere.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best for education but not for fun.
reviews.review_text: The college has good classrooms. Lab facilities are available, but there is no practical experience. There are a library and sports facilities. Every year, at least one student gets rank in the merit list of AKTU. More than 20 students get 85% and above marks. I also got 87% marks in B.Tech first year. The college only provides a better education but not practical knowledge.

overview_faqs.question: Is Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech, After 1th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.8 on campuslife, 3.1 on placements, 3.6 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for studies, not for placements.

content.Placements: There are very few placements because only a few companies visit our college for placements. Companies that visited our college are not giving placements. Most companies only offer internships in which we must pay the company to be placed. There is a training and placement department, which is very helpful for us in terms of training for soft skills as well as telling us about the campus jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and the campus are very good. Most of the classrooms are smart classrooms with a screen and speakers. The library is good, and most of the books that a student needs are available. The hostel is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives a very good experience with college and faculty.

content.Placements: Placements are good. Around 75% of students get placed. Placement cell is very supportive in bringing companies. Every year companies like Mahindra, Ceat, Jsw, Infosys, etc., offer placements. The average salary package is 4 LPA and the highest salary package is 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: College has all the needed infrastructure. It provides all the facilities like Wi-Fi, laboratories, library, and digital classrooms. Canteen is very well maintained with hygienic. College is located on the highway to Wardha of the city Nagpur which is easily reachable.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering(Data Science) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is a good college with awesome faculty and placements.

content.Placements: The college provides good placement opportunities for students. Companies like BYJU's, TATA, HCL, etc., come here. The internships are provided to those students who qualified for the aptitude tests. Many students got internships in online and offline modes in steel companies. I didn't attend any internship program yet because I am in my 1st year. I heard that the institute takes special classes to prepare the students for placements, like personality development, spoken English classes, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are available in our college. It is a very nice place to live with friends and classmates. The availability of books is good in a big library. The university has an excellent hostel, with good rooms, Wi-Fi, etc. The canteen is average. There are spacious and good library and labs. The college has Wi-Fi for students and staff, with a good speed. The food quality is pretty good. The college focuses on internals and extracurricular activities of all students. Chemical labs, mechanical labs, civil, and electrical labs are available with all the practical equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering(Data Science) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering.

content.Placements: The college provides good placement opportunities for students. Companies like BYJU's, TATA, HCL, etc., come here. The internships are provided to those students who qualified the aptitude tests. Many students got internships in online and offline modes in steel companies. I didn't attend any internship program yet because I am in my 1st year. I heard that the institute takes special classes to prepare the students for placements, like personality development, spoken English classes etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are available in our college. It is a very nice place to live with friends and classmates. The availability of books is good in a big library. The university has an excellent hostel, with good rooms, Wi-Fi etc. The canteen is average. There are spacious and good library and labs. The college has Wi-Fi for students and staff, with a good speed. Food quality is pretty good. The college focuses on internals and extracurricular activities of all students. Chemical labs, mechanical labs, civil, and electrical labs are available with all the practical equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Not satisfied. The college should focus on the quality, not quantity.

content.Placements: Placements in our college were the worst. All BPO companies participated in our college. From 2017 or 2018 batch, only one guy got selected with a handsome package. Rest are still struggling for jobs. Very few MNCs visited the campus. The highest salary package offered was 8 LPA. But, the ratio of good companies participating is very less.
content.Infrastructure: It is a good campus with greenery all around. Wi-Fi facility is not good. Classrooms are good enough. The library is good. Medical facilities are poor. There are no common rooms for girls and boys. Sports room is not available, and we are not given much time for games. Transport facilities are good.

paragraphs: Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering admissions are based on merit. The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.

faqs.question: How can I get into Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Abha Gaikwad Patil College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree in the relevant field from AICTE or Central or State Government approved institutions or equivalent, with above mentioned marks (at least 45% marks in case of candidates of Backward class categories and persons with disability belonging to Maharashtra State only).
For sponsored candidates, candidate must have minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.B.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.After 10th DiplomaCandidate passed 10th class/SS

reviews.review_heading: Teaching quality is between average to good.
reviews.review_text: Earlier, Wi-Fi was properly working in the college but now, it is not working properly but in hostel, it is working, and it is free to use. Labs are good in this college. Classrooms are more than average, and we also have a library. In hostel, there is no management of food. The principal of this college is most of the time does not present in the college, so you will face many problems when you complain.

reviews.review_heading: GEC, Banswara, has everything needed to set an example for society.
reviews.review_text: The syllabus is according to Rajasthan Technical University. The hostel is good and with a lot of amenities. The infrastructure is well developed, and new buildings are proposed by the state government. The main building costs 35 crores, and the hostel costs 2 crores.

reviews.review_heading: GEC, Banswara is the only best college in the district.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi facilities for 24 hours. Our college has smart classrooms, a central library and a well-equipped boys hostel with gym facility and mess. The canteen serves good food, and it is a lush green campus. Sports and medical facilities are also available in the college. Students get the best facilities at this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college in 2017. Now, the situation has changed, so one can study here.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good, and labs for the electrical engineering branch are well-equipped. Classrooms are big, and there is a digital platform presence in classrooms. The library is also well-equipped, and you can study in the library. There are cricket ground, volleyball ground and badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. I have played games on a projector in the lab. They give good freedom. The hostel fee is Rs. 4000. The food served in the hostel is good. The hostel staff members are friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Overall its good for education good and effortinf faculty but no college life here.
reviews.review_text: Internet connectivity and Wi-Fi is very good hostel facility is better than every where best in rtu division. Best in budget too only 4000 permonth and its very cheap in comparison to other private colleges and this college is no longer government so choose wisely if you have civil branch there is no problem.

individual_reviews.title: Now the college name is changed by the new management from sree ernakulathappan to ICCS.

content.Placements: Placement was below average. At my study period in 4rth year there was an placement function in which there was company representatives visited the college to take interview of students. Companies like pinnacle, volkswagen, indus motors was in the placement function. Below 10 percent of students were placed.
content.Infrastructure: When it comes to infrastructure at that time was average but now the new rich management made improvements and made to international standard level. The college now has ISO certification. Now new hostel with more facilities was builded in front of the college which was I seen last year when I attended the supplimentary examination in my college, everything was improved very much now. Now the new management changed the name of college sree ernakulathappan college to ICCS college of engineering and management. Now the library, canteen facilities also improved very much. Also in the field of sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Placement team helps us to get placed at least in one company.

review_content.Placements: About 95% of the students in our department got placed. The maximum salary package offered was 3.5 LPA, and the minimum salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. Top MNC companies like CTS and Accenture visit our campus and hire students with good salary package. Some top roles, like software developer, software tester, etc., are offered to the students. About 85% of students got an internship in government companies like TNPL, Mettur Thermal Power Plant, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides separate labs for all departments. It offers a friendly environment. It serves healthy food for students. Sports grounds are available, but there is no hospitals or medical facility on the campus. First aid facilities are available. Yearly once sports day is conducted for hostel students.

faqs.answer: Gnanamani College of Engineering has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Gnanamani College of Engineering has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Construction Engineering, Structural Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Power Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Electrical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Food Technology.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Gnanamani College of Engineering offer to students?

faqs.answer: Gnanamani College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Civil Engineering/Civil and Structural Engineering. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good for acquiring the knowledge and percentage. Have to adjust to the infrastructure. No enjoyment.

review_content.Placements: There were placements for our batch, and senior batch, 10% or less were placed among us. The highest salary is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA, and the average salary offered was Rs.12,000. There are no internships were offered, and no stipend is paid for the internship. There is a placement cell, and it's not at all functioning properly.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility in this college. The library is available, but not updated with the latest books. The classrooms are not good, and there is no fan or AC, and the boards are of cheap quality. There are no facilities for the sports and games. The quality of the lab is bad and has the all outdated equipment. The quality of the food available is very bad. The hostel is bad, and there is no clean toilet. We wish we had the projectors in all the classrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of faculty but placements and other infrastructure facilities need improvement.

review_content.Placements: The placements for our senior batch was there but not for our batch, as many from our batch were not interested in placements. They are most probably planning for good placements for future batches. Also, since Raichur is not such big city, so you can't expect a good number of companies to visit with handsome salary packages.
review_content.Infrastructure: MBA course has a separate building and the infrastructure is fine. Also, it has a big library with good and useful books and a large space for studying. There is a ground for playing cricket, an auditorium for organizing functions like farewell, welcome, and other events. Also, the ground is big enough to organize big events. Our batch participated twice in organizing Manthan - inter-college fest and mega marketing fair.
