individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an above-average college.

content.Placements: Almost every student got placed in our campus placements. The highest package for MBA students in our college is 12 LPA. Top recruiting companies of our college are Whirpool, Honda, QSpiders, etc. Approximately 60-70% of students got internships in top companies. The top role offered is structural engineering.
content.Infrastructure: Basic needs like drinking water and its quality should be improved. The restrooms are above average. The library is wide with good books quantity. The quality of food in the mess is okay. Mess and canteens have ambiance and are spacious enough for eating.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My college memories so far.

content.Placements: I guess 40% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered by Kyndril is 1.5 LPA. I did not get any internship opportunities from our college. There are no placements at all in our college. The college had 0% placement opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not good because classrooms were very old and very clumsy with broken windows. There were no separate blocks for each department. Two departments were under the same building which made its infrastructure clumsy and old.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Having nice and good faculty members, placements are very average, and infrastructure is not bad.

content.Placements: 76% of students got placed in this course. The lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The highest salary is 12 LPA. Infosys hires those students who score above 6 CGPA in semi-conductor. But the future of courses is so dark itself, and workshops will be conducted for money purposes, so I can say that the college is so average.
content.Infrastructure: EC lab doesn't have AC requirement. Sports are so bad and canteens are very average. Hostel is very vintage (old). Wi-Fi is very bad on campus. Library is so good. Classrooms are average, some benches are broken.

description: H K E Society's SLN College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

H K E Society's SLN College of Engineering Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 15466 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 30166 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was more competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at H K E Society's SLN College of Engineering. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 15466 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 34960, while in 2023, it was 43232.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.

In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 271261, in the General All India quota.

reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college in Punjab.

review_content.Placements: Our college did not provided placements. There was no placement cell. Internships were not provided. There was no guidance provided by our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus was on the hills, so students could connect with nature, helping them develop physically and mentally. The atmosphere was pleasant.
review_content.Faculty: Exams developed by the university were very good and suitable. Exams were difficult. The structure of exams was good. It helped us work hard for the future. Exams were conducted by the university. Our college does not conduct them.

review_content.Infrastructure: All infrastructure are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library etc. Quality of the hostel is good but food of the hostel is not good. Sports and games are played in the college and medical facilities are also available in the college. Everyone is good but college teachers are not so good .

Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Accounting & Commerce, Engineering, Science, IT & Software. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Tawi Group of Colleges has a review rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 3.5 on placements, 4 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Tawi Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Tawi Group of Colleges.

content.Placements: Our college did not provide placements. There was no placement cell. Internships were not provided. There was no guidance provided by our college. The placements are very low.
content.Infrastructure: All infrastructure is available, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, etc. The quality of the hostel is good, but the food at the hostel is not good. Sports and games are played in the college, and medical facilities are also available in the college. Everyone is good, but college teachers are not so good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very qualified, helpful, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. This course is curriculum-relevant sometimes, but it does not make the students industry-ready. Semester exams are of a moderate level, and the passing mark is 23.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college in Punjab.

content.Placements: Our college did not provided placements. There was no placement cell. Internships were not provided. There was no guidance provided by our college.
content.Infrastructure: The campus was on the hills, so students could connect with nature, helping them develop physically and mentally. The atmosphere was pleasant.
content.Faculty: Exams developed by the university were very good and suitable. Exams were difficult. The structure of exams was good. It helped us work hard for the future. Exams were conducted by the university. Our college does not conduct them.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is good but teachers and staff are not good .

content.Placements: 23 students are placed in our course. No recruiting companies are coming to this college. Coding and some computer courses are offered in our course. No packages are offered in our course. My batch did not get any internship offer and didn't get any jobs.
content.Infrastructure: All infrastructure are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library etc. Quality of the hostel is good but food of the hostel is not good. Sports and games are played in the college and medical facilities are also available in the college. Everyone is good but college teachers are not so good .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of the faculty .

content.Placements: This is Mannu mahotra graduated in B.Tech civil engineering from Tawi engineering college Punjab. I am from 2012-2016 batch of 2016 passing out year. 65% of students were placed in my course The highest salary package was 9.2lakh and the lowest package is 1.8 LPA Average salary package was 3.2lakh. Top recruiting companies are Jaypee group of companies, Navayuga, Megha engineering and infrastructure limited, JSW etc. 78% of students got the internships in my course I companies such as L&T, Navayuga, Build mate etc. The top roles offered in my course are graduate engineer trainee, plant engineer, junior engineer.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Not too much satisfied as the administration of the college is not helpful, but teachers are good.

content.Placements: For computer Science students the placement is very good but for civil, electrical & electronics there are few opportunities. This is the reason many civil students did not get placed through campus recruitment drives. In my batch the 80% Computer Science students were placed in reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: Tawi is overall a good college, infrastructure is good, laboratories as well as library is too good. Separate hostels for boys and girls. Mess food is not up to the mark. Food available in the canteen is good. Well spacious classrooms and Laboratories. Playground for games and sports. Campus is not Wi-Fi enabled. There is no medical facility within the campus.

Institute present diversified 10 UG programs, which are designed to meet the learning aspirations of students from various backgrounds. When it comes to choosing a good Institute for higher learning, PRT Institute of Technology and Science comes to mind. Student has the option to choose courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, B.E. / B.Tech with stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software PRT Institute of Technology and Science offers its students to gain professional expertize through its trained & experienced faculty in studies of Chemical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Biotechnology Engineering. college_info.college_name: Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies:

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies is up to 210. Good thing to know is that Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is the king of engineering college.

review_content.Placements: Our college doesn't provide placements. Earlier students were getting placed but students didn't show much interest in placements and they were getting placed externally so college management decided to call off placement. Now students are getting placed externally.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty large consisting of 2 to 3 floors of building. Our college has a great library, sports equipment, fast Wi-Fi, several labs, etc. The hostel is pretty good with two fans in each room a tube light and four almirahs. The food quality is average on a scale.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Awesome infrastructure and facilities and also good faculty.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of students got placed in my course. The average salary package offered is 2.3 LPA. Students got placed as assistant engineers, junior engineers in industries and consulting companies like Tata Steel, project engineers in Biolaxi Enzymes Pvt Ltd Nandurbar, site engineers in Gajul infra Projects India Pvt Ltd Nashik, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have well-furnished classrooms, digital labs, and Wi-Fi. There is a well-furnished and separate hostel for boys and girls with hygiene. The college gives us training for personality development, campus recruitment, and knowledge improvement with NPTEL, guest lectures, seminars, short courses such as AutoCAD, and effective use of ICT. There are facilities for indoor and outdoor games. We have a well-arranged annual function.

admission_process.title: Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studiesoffers courses at UG levels. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,03,568. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years.

description: Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff was 140258 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 140258.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 8.67 and 14.06, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Mechanical, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 14.06. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 8.67, Civ

Jamia Institute Of Engineering And Management Studies MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Mechanical turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 14.06. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 51.22 in the General category under the HS quota.
